title: Noun Phrase Domain Schema
description: Validates nominal heads (NOUN, PROPN, PRON), tracking lexical classes, animacy properties, countability, and noun-phrase level structural behavior.

pos_payload.title: Nominal Part of Speech Payload
pos_payload.description: Behavioral payload for tokens serving as noun-phrase structural heads or core nominal arguments.

token_class.title: Noun Token Subtype
token_class.description: The macro-functional lexical subclass of the nominal entry.

noun_class.title: Noun Semantic Class
noun_class.description: Inherent semantic category of the noun entity, useful for animacy alignment or selectional restrictions.

countability.title: Countability Profile
countability.description: Specifies whether the noun can directly interact with numeral expressions or requires generic/specific classifiers.

surface_forms.title: Orthographic Surface Forms
surface_forms.description: An array containing all standardized surface level orthographic representations of this nominal entry.

structural_constraints.title: Syntactic & Morphosyntactic Constraints
structural_constraints.description: Machine-readable declarations controlling possessive clitic serialization, case alignment, or classifier dependencies.

internal_structure.title: Internal Morphological Structure
internal_structure.description: Decomposes the noun lemma to track nominalization affixes, root compounds, or derivation patterns using the shared derivation schema.

derivation_details.description: Shared schema mapping for the underlying base lemma, category, and derivational process type.

is_compound.title: Compound Flag
is_compound.description: True if the nominal base involves multiple independent lexical roots.

morphotactics.title: Morphotactic Formula
morphotactics.description: Formalized structural expression displaying the nominal composition pattern (e.g., 'STEM_II + -na').
